title: News Corp shareholder T Rowe Price raises concerns about merger with Fox - NYT
text: T. Rowe Price , a major shareholder in News Corp , said it had strong reservations about Rupert Murdoch's plan to reunite News Corp and Fox Corp , The New York Times reported on Friday, making it the third investor to express dissent over the plan.

title: Potential News Corp, Fox reunion faces opposition from large shareholder
text: One of the largest shareholders in both News Corp and Fox is opposing a recombination of the companies.

title: News Corp.-Fox Merger Said To Face Opposition From Key Shareholder In Both Companies
text: A London-based investor in Rupert Murdoch's News Corp. and Fox Corp. has reportedly expressed its opposition to the companies' potential reunification. Independent Franchise Partners is one of the largest shareholders apart from the Murdoch family, with stakes in Fox and News Corp. of more than 7%.

title: News Corporation (NWSA) Q1 Earnings Miss Mark, Sales Dip Y/Y
text: News Corporation's (NWSA) lower-than-expected first-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect the softness in revenues across all the segments except the Dow Jones unit.

title: News Corp (NWSA) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: News Corp (NASDAQ:NWSA ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 8, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Mike Florin - SVP & Head, IR Robert Thomson - CEO Susan Panuccio - CFO Conference Call Participants Kane Hannan - Goldman Sachs David Karnovsky - JPMorgan Darren Leung - Macquarie Brian Han - Morningstar Operator Welcome to News Corp First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Conference Call. Today's conference is being recorded.

title: News Corp. (NWSA) Misses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: News Corp. (NWSA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -40% and 3.49%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
